rules.rule_text:
rule Lumma2
{
	meta:
		author = "fabamatic"
		description = "Lumma2 system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "LummaC2, Build:" ascii
		$x2 = "LID (Lumma ID):" ascii
		$x3 = "- Screen resolution:" ascii
		$x4 = "- HWID:" ascii
		$x5 = "- OS Version:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
